# Balloon

## Tags
party, festival, congratulations, celebration, decoration, colorful, floating, fun, birthday, event, entertainment

## Categories
emoji

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/balloon)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Balloon;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Balloon { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
